cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking why foreign kids want to learn Chinese. The options are A, B, C, D. First, I need to look at the text provided. He says English is easier, but he still wants to learn Chinese to study at Peking University. Then it goes on to talk about South Korea having many Chinese learners and competitions.
